summary: Policy Management Platform — a full-stack app with a .NET 8 BFF (Backend-for-Frontend) service and planned web dashboard. API behavior is spec-driven with endpoint contracts defined in spec files.
structure:
src/
  PolicyManagement.Bff/
    Controllers/
      PoliciesController
    Services/
      PolicyService
      IPolicyService
    Data/
      PolicyDbContext
      PolicySeedData
    Models/
      PolicyEnums
      Policy
    DTOs/
    Exceptions/
      PolicyValidationException
tests/
  PolicyManagement.Bff.Tests/
    PolicyServiceTestFixture
    PolicyServiceBehaviourTests
.claude/
  specs/
    *.md
